Bash(for FILE in \\

  "/mnt/c/Users/marouen/Desktop/app/homservice/lib/features/mission/presentation/widgets/create_mission/step_budget.dart" \\
  "/mnt/c/Users/marouen/Desktop/app/homservice/lib/features/mission/presentation/widgets/create_mission/step_address.dart"; do

sed -i \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.black87/AppColors.textPrimary/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[900\\]/AppColors.textPrimary/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[800\\]/AppColors.textPrimary/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[700\\]/AppColors.textSecondary/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[600\\]!/AppColors.textSecondary/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[600\\]/AppColors.textSecondary/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[500\\]/AppColors.textTertiary/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[400\\]!/AppColors.textHint/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[400\\]/AppColors.textHint/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[300\\]!/AppColors.border/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[300\\]/AppColors.border/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[200\\]!/AppColors.divider/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[200\\]/AppColors.divider/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[100\\]/AppColors.surfaceAlt/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.grey\\[50\\]/AppColors.background/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.green\\.withOpacity/AppColors.success.withOpacity/g' \\
  -e 's/color: Colors\\.green,/color: AppColors.success,/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.green\\b/AppColors.success/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.blue\\.withOpacity/AppColors.info.withOpacity/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.blue\\[700\\]/AppColors.info/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.blue\\[600\\]/AppColors.info/g' \\
  -e 's/color: Colors\\.blue,/color: AppColors.info,/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.red\\.withOpacity/AppColors.error.withOpacity/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.red\\[700\\]/AppColors.error/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.red\\[600\\]/AppColors.error/g' \\
  -e 's/color: Colors\\.red,/color: AppColors.error,/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.orange\\.withOpacity/AppColors.warning.withOpacity/g' \\
  -e 's/color: Colors\\.orange,/color: AppColors.warning,/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.orange\\b/AppColors.warning/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.amber\\[700\\]/AppColors.gold/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.amber\\[600\\]/AppColors.gold/g' \\
  -e 's/Colors\\.amber\\b/AppColors.gold/g' \\
  "$FILE"

sed -i \\
  -e 's/BorderRadius\\.circular\(24\)/BorderRadius.circular\(AppRadius.cardLg\)/g' \\
  -e 's/BorderRadius\\.circular\(20\)/BorderRadius.circular\(AppRadius.cardLg\)/g' \\
  -e 's/BorderRadius\\.circular\(16\)/BorderRadius.circular\(AppRadius.card\)/g' \\
  -e 's/BorderRadius\\.circular\(14\)/BorderRadius.circular\(AppRadius.button\)/g' \\
  -e 's/BorderRadius\\.circular\(12\)/BorderRadius.circular\(AppRadius.input\)/g' \\
  -e 's/BorderRadius\\.circular\(10\)/BorderRadius.circular\(AppRadius.badge\)/g' \\
  -e 's/BorderRadius\\.circular\(8\)/BorderRadius.circular\(AppRadius.small\)/g' \\
  -e 's/BorderRadius\\.circular\(6\)/BorderRadius.circular\(AppRadius.xs\)/g' \\
  "$FILE"

python3 -c "
import re
with open\('$FILE', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
content = re.sub\(
    r'boxShadow: \\[\\s*BoxShadow\\\(\\s*color: Colors\\.black\\.withOpacity\\\(0\\.0[3-6]\\\),\\s*blurRadius: \\d+,\\s*offset: const Offset\\\(0, \\d+\\\),\\s*\\\),\\s*\\],',
    'boxShadow: AppShadows.card,',
    content
\)
content = re.sub\(r'style: const TextStyle\\\(\\s*fontSize: 24,\\s*fontWeight: FontWeight\\.w800,\\s*\\\)', 'style: AppTextStyles.h2', content\)
content = re.sub\(r'style: const TextStyle\\\(\\s*fontSize: 20,\\s*fontWeight: FontWeight\\.w700,\\s*\\\)', 'style: AppTextStyles.h3', content\)
content = re.sub\(r'style: const TextStyle\\\(\\s*fontSize: 18,\\s*fontWeight: FontWeight\\.w700,\\s*\\\)', 'style: AppTextStyles.h3', content\)
content = re.sub\(r'style: const TextStyle\\\(\\s*fontSize: 16,\\s*fontWeight: FontWeight\\.w700,\\s*\\\)', 'style: AppTextStyles.h4', content\)
content = re.sub\(r'style: const TextStyle\\\(\\s*fontSize: 14,\\s*fontWeight: FontWeight\\.w600,\\s*\\\)', 'style: AppTextStyles.label', content\)
with open\('$FILE', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)
" && echo "OK: $FILE"
done)

Bash(python3 - << 'EOF'
with open\('/mnt/c/Users/marouen/Desktop/homservice/lib/features/profile/presentation/pages/shared/account_page.dart', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# Lines are 1-indexed; remove lines 993 to 1593 \(indices 992 to 1592\)
new_lines = lines[:992] + lines[1593:]

with open\('/mnt/c/Users/marouen/Desktop/homservice/lib/features/profile/presentation/pages/shared/account_page.dart', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.writelines\(new_lines\)

print\(f"Done. Original: {len\(lines\)} lines, New: {len\(new_lines\)} lines"\)
EOF)
